upscaler.options.rt.exposureMode.tooltip: How the ray-traced image is mapped to display brightness. Auto adapts to scene luminance; Manual applies a fixed EV offset.
upscaler.options.rt.manualEv.tooltip: Exposure compensation in stops (EV), used when Exposure is set to Manual.
upscaler.options.rt.spp.tooltip: Path-tracing samples taken per pixel each frame. Higher is cleaner but more demanding.
upscaler.options.rt.sunSize.tooltip: Angular radius of the sun and moon disk. Larger discs cast softer shadow penumbrae.
upscaler.options.rt.entities.tooltip: Include entities and block entities in the ray-traced scene.
upscaler.options.rt.particles.tooltip: Draw particles as camera-ray billboards inside the traced scene.
upscaler.options.rt.waterWaves.tooltip: Animate water-surface normals for moving wave highlights.
upscaler.options.rt.debugView.tooltip: Visualize an intermediate ray-tracing buffer instead of the final image.
